steps.t: Elfmar is standing outside his Mead Hall, and he wishes to speak with you about the possibility of training his men.
Elfmar wishes to train with you.
Nona and Horn are in the field outside the Faldham Mead Hall.
Elfmar's men are in the field outside the Mead Hall of Faldham. Elfmar has asked you to train with his men so they will have some additional battle ex…
Elfmar wants to have another bout with you.
Corudan wishes to train with you as well.
Elfmar is in the field outside the Mead Hall of Faldham.
